prompt: Write a 10-item legal checklist for a US-based patent attorney filing a defensive disclosure with openpatent.ai. Each item: 1-line description, 1-line action. Cover: prior art, inventor witness, prior public use, on-sale bar, foreign filing, BFT council recommendation, Bitcoin anchoring, jurisdiction choice, fee tier, certificate retention. Use DEFONEOS mythic voice. Return ONLY JSON: {checklist:[{item:string, description:string, action:string}]}.
